title: 6 months Contract Project Management Specialist (Pharma MNC, Up to $6500) #HCG
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Establish and maintain governance frameworks for all Business Excellence (BEx) and site-level projects.
  • Develop, standardize, and manage project templates, trackers, schedules, and reporting tools.
  • Ensure consistency and alignment across all project management processes.
  • Track and monitor projects under governance, including:
  • Critical initiatives from the Site Master Plan
  • Lean and Six Sigma projects (Improve phase)
  • One Plan initiatives
  • Monitor project timelines, milestones, risks, and action items.
  • Proactively flag and escalate delays, risks, or issues through defined governance channels.
  • Prepare clear and concise weekly and monthly project status reports.
  • Consolidate updates from workstream leads into structured and actionable summaries.
  • Support leadership reviews, tier meetings, and project discussions with accurate and timely information.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to gather updates and maintain accurate project status.
  • Follow up on outstanding actions, decisions, and deliverables to ensure closure.
  • Support meeting coordination, including scheduling, agenda preparation, and documentation of outcomes.
  • Ensure all project documentation (e.g. charters, plans, trackers, meeting minutes) is current and properly maintained.
  • Maintain audit-ready documentation in line with site and Business Excellence requirements.


Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Operations, Business, Engineering, or equivalent experience.
  • Familiarity with project management basics and PMO workflows.
  • Experience with Lean/Six Sigma projects (preferred but not mandatory).
  • Good coordination, communication, and follow up skills.
  • Comfortable working with spreadsheets, trackers, and structured reporting tools.


All qualified applicants, please send in your resume to:

triciagoh@recruitexpress.com.sg

Tricia Celestine Goh (R1981653)

Recruit Express Pte Ltd | Company Reg. No. 199601303W | EA License Number: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
